hindi: ॐ ऐं ह्रीं श्रीं श्री माtre नमः।
english: Om Aim Hreem Shreem — salutations to the divine Mother Sri
roman: Om Aim Hreem Shreem Sri Matre namah

english: She whose form is red as vermilion, three-eyed, with a crown of rubies gleaming
Wearing the stars as her crown, with a smiling face and full bosom
roman: Taranaayaka shekharam smitamukhim aapeena vakshore ham

english: In her hands she holds a cup full of wine and a red lotus
roman: Panibhyam alipurna ratna chashakam raktotpalam bibhrateem

english: Gentle, feet red as gems in the vessel — meditate on the supreme Mother
roman: Saumyam ratna ghata stha rakta charanam dhyayet Parambikam

hindi: श्री माता श्री महाराज्ञी श्रीमत् सिंहासनेश्वरी।
english: The divine Mother, the great queen, the Goddess of the auspicious throne
roman: Shri Mata Shri Maharajni Shrimat sinhasaneshvari

english: Born from the fire-pit of pure consciousness, ever engaged in the work of the gods
roman: Chidagni kundha sambhuta deva karya samudyata

english: Radiant as a thousand rising suns, endowed with four arms
roman: Udyad bhanu sahasrabha chatur bahu samanvita

english: Embodiment of passion holding the noose, embodiment of wrath holding the bright goad

hindi: एवं श्री ललिता देव्याः नाम्नां साहस्रकं जगुः।
english: Thus the thousand names of Sri Lalita Devi were sung
roman: Evam Sri Lalita devyah namnam sahasrakam jaguh

hindi: यः पठेत् श्रद्धया नित्यं स प्रयाति परं पदम्॥
english: Whoever reads them with devotion daily attains the supreme state
roman: Yah paathet shraddhaya nityam sa prayati param padam
